issues.title: [EPOCH] Slow Database Queries
issues.body:
## EPOCH Autonomous Detection

**Category:** performance
**Severity:** 6/10
**Probability:** 70%

### Description
There have been 3 slow database queries detected. These could be causing increased latency and should be optimized to improve overall system performance.

### Predicted Impact
Continued slow database queries will result in higher latency and reduced system performance.

### Suggested Action
Analyze the slow queries and optimize them. Consider indexing strategies or query rewrites to improve performance.

---
*Detected autonomously by EPOCH — no human prompt required.*

issues.title: Investigate rising error rate
issues.body: System has shown a rising trend in error rates. Analyze recent logs and code changes.

issues.title: [EPOCH] Rising Error Rate
issues.body:
## EPOCH Autonomous Detection

**Category:** reliability
**Severity:** 8/10
**Probability:** 80%

### Description
The system has shown a rising trend in error rates over the past few hours. This could indicate an underlying issue that needs to be addressed to prevent further degradation of system performance.

### Predicted Impact
If not addressed, the rising error rate could lead to system instability and potential downtime.

### Suggested Action
Investigate recent code changes and logs to identify the root cause of the errors. Implement necessary fixes and monitor the system to ensure stability.

---
*Detected autonomously by EPOCH — no human prompt required.*
